search.title: Find your next role
search.lead: Search professional opportunities from approved employers.
search.selectPrompt: Select a role to preview it here.
search.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your filters to see more opportunities.

emptyTips.support: Ask MHA for help finding a role

search.loadingDescription: Matching your filters to available opportunities.
search.errorDescription: Something went wrong while searching. Please try again.
search.resultsSummary: {count, plural, =0 {No roles} one {# role} other {# roles}}

card.fitWhenSignedIn: Sign in to see your Job Fit

detail.notFoundTitle: This role is no longer available
detail.notFoundBody: It may have closed or been removed. Browse other open roles.
detail.errorBody: Please try again in a moment.
detail.noDescription: No description was provided for this role.
detail.screeningIntro: If you apply, you'll be asked:

panel.title: Apply for this role
panel.easyApplyNote: Easy Apply — your profile and resume are ready to send.
panel.signInPrompt: Sign in to apply and save this role.

fit.title: Smart Job Fit
fit.previewBody: Sign in to see a transparent, rule-based fit score with matched factors and honest gaps.
fit.signInBody: See a transparent, rule-based fit score with matched factors and honest gaps for this role.
fit.signInPrompt: Sign in to see your Job Fit
fit.scoreSr: Your Job Fit score is {score} percent: {band}.
fit.regenerateErrorBody: Your existing Job Fit is still shown. Please try again in a moment.
fit.errorBody: We could not load your Job Fit for this role. Please try again.
fit.emptyBody: Add your preferences and upload a resume so we can compute a meaningful Job Fit for this role.
fit.disclaimer: Job Fit shows alignment only. It does not guarantee an interview or a hire.

support.title: Not sure if this role is right?
support.body: Ask an MHA consultant for guidance on this application.
